case_title: FLORES, MARIBEL VS MISSION MOTORS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $742.00 FILED BY FLORES, MARIBEL AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION MOTORS MEFER VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE; NO DESCRIPTION/ NAME GIVEN ON SUBSTITUTED SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEFER VICTOR
DEFENDANT LEAVING OF COUNTRY & REQUEST CONTINUANCE SEND PAPER WORK TO JUDGE TO SIGN.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-27-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-27-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SECOND CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFT. DENIED.
$10.00 FEE FOR CONTINUANCE REQUEST WHICH WAS DENIED, RETURNED TO DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, MARIBEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISSION MOTORS MEFER VICTOR $742.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $757.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
